title: Partial enforcement
doc_html:
Art. 1307.9. Partial enforcement

            If a tribunal of this state does not recognize and enforce a Convention support order in its entirety, it shall enforce any severable part of the order. An application or direct request may seek recognition and partial enforcement of a Convention support order.

            Acts 2015, No. 80, §1, eff. July 1, 2015.
doc_text:
Art. 1307.9.  Partial enforcement
If a tribunal of this state does not recognize and enforce a Convention support order
in its entirety, it shall enforce any severable part of the order.  An application or direct
request may seek recognition and partial enforcement of a Convention support order.
Acts 2015, No. 80, §1, eff. July 1, 2015.
